title: [InstCombine][profcheck] Preserve profile with negated select conditionals
summary: The developers generalized the DeMorgan optimization by extending pattern matching beyond the basic `select a, b, false` (logical AND) case. They identified that `select !a, !b, false` also represents a logical AND of inverted conditions, enabling transformation to `!(select a, true, b)`. Similarly, `select !a, true, !b` maps to logical OR of inverted conditions, becoming `!(select a, b, false)`. This leverages existing `m_LogicalAnd/Or` matchers while adding constraints to avoid constant expressions and ensure one-use limits to prevent infinite loops. The generalization also preserves profile metadata by using `swapProfMetadata()` when creating new selects. This approach demonstrates how to expand optimizations by recognizing equivalent logical forms through inversions, applying consistent one-use checks, and maintaining metadata correctness.
